# WOWOHCOOL — OEM/ODM Charging Solutions Manufacturer
> Professional OEM/ODM manufacturer of wireless chargers, power banks, GaN chargers, and car chargers. ISO 9001 certified factory in Shenzhen, China since 2013. Specializing in semi-solid-state battery technology, GaN V charging, and Qi2 wireless charging. Serving 200+ global brands including Bosch and Jacob Jensen. Factory-direct pricing with MOQ starting at 500 units.

## About the Factory
https://www.wowohcool.com/about
> ISO 9001 certified | 5,000 sqm facility | 50+ R&D engineers | 1,000,000+ units monthly capacity | 4-stage QC (IQC/IPQC/FQC/OQC) | Since 2013 | Clients: Bosch, Jacob Jensen

## Key Differentiators
- Semi-solid-state battery technology (CES 2026 featured): 50% thinner, 30% higher energy density, zero thermal runaway
- GaN V (5th generation): 40% smaller than silicon, 30% better heat dissipation, PD 3.1 up to 240W
- Qi2 MPP certified: 15W universal fast charging with N52H neodymium magnets
- 10+ years specialized in charging only (not a general electronics factory)
- End-to-end OEM/ODM: ID design -> PCBA -> tooling -> mass production

## Products
- **Power Banks** (semi-solid-state & Li-polymer): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/power-bank
  - 5,000mAh - 27,000mAh (99.9Wh airline-safe), PD 3.1 up to 140W, semi-solid-state battery, wireless Qi2.2 charging, built-in cables, TFT display
- **GaN Chargers** (GaN V technology): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/gan-charger
  - 20W - 240W PD 3.1, GaN V, multi-port, retractable cable options, power strips with USB-C PD, 40% smaller than silicon
- **Wireless Chargers** (Qi2 MPP certified): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/wireless-charger
  - 15W MPP fast charging, N52H magnets, 3-in-1 folding stations, car mounts, night light stations, zinc alloy docks, ice-cooling stations
- **Car Chargers** (GaN V): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/car-charger
  - PD 3.1 up to 140W, auto-retractable 0.8m USB-C cable, 12V-24V input, digital voltage display, E-Mark certified
- **2-in-1 Hybrid Chargers**: Wall charger + 10,000mAh power bank in one device
- **Heating Apparel Batteries**: 7.4V/12.6V DC output for heated clothing
- **Power Strips with USB-C PD**: Desktop power strips with 65W USB-C PD and GaN compact design

## Services
- OEM/ODM Manufacturing: https://www.wowohcool.com/service
  - Full OEM/ODM capability: custom design, tooling, production, and packaging
  - MOQ: 500 units (ODM) / 2,000 units (OEM)
  - Lead time: 25-30 days (OEM), 45-60 days (custom ODM)
  - 4-stage QC process with 100% aging test
  - Certification support: CE, FCC, RoHS, Qi2, UL, PSE, KC, UN38.3

## Certifications
- CE (Europe), FCC (US), RoHS (global), Qi2 (WPC), UL (US), PSE (Japan), KC (Korea), UN38.3 (battery transport)
- ISO 9001 certified manufacturing facility
- E-Mark (automotive), Qi2 MPP (magnetic wireless)

## Blog Articles

### Sourcing & Factory Verification
- How to Choose a Reliable China Charger Supplier: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/choose-reliable-china-charger-supplier
  - Complete guide to finding, verifying, and negotiating with Chinese charger manufacturers
- Factory Verification Checklist: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/factory-verification-checklist
  - Step-by-step audit checklist for verifying Chinese electronics factories
- How to Choose a Wireless Charger Factory: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/how-to-choose-factory
  - Qi2 audit guide: FOD testing, coil quality, thermal management, and WPC membership verification
- Top 10 Power Bank Manufacturers in China: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/top-power-bank-manufacturers-china
  - Ranked comparison of top Chinese power bank OEM/ODM factories (WOWOHCOOL ranked #1)
- Quality Control Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/quality-control-guide
  - 4-stage QC, aging tests, defect rate targets, and compliance documentation for charger manufacturing

### Technical Guides
- GaN Chargers Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/gan-chargers-guide
  - How GaN technology replaces silicon in chargers: benefits, comparisons, and sourcing
- GaN Generations Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/gan-generations-guide
  - Comparison of GaN I through GaN V: switching frequency, efficiency, and cost differences
- USB-C PD Fast Charging Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/usb-c-pd-fast-charging-guide
  - Complete guide to USB-C Power Delivery 3.1, PPS, wattage tiers, and device compatibility
- Power Bank Specs Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/power-bank-specs-guide
  - Understanding mAh, Wh, PD wattage, cell types, and power bank safety specs
- Qi2 vs MagSafe Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/qi2-vs-magsafe-guide
  - Comparison of Qi2, MagSafe, and Qi wireless charging standards for B2B buyers
- How Wireless Charging Works: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/wireless-charging-works
  - Science of electromagnetic induction, Qi2 MPP, FOD, and thermal management explained
- Car Charger Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/car-charger-guide
  - How to choose GaN car chargers: PD 3.1, retractable cables, safety certifications, fleet management

- US & EU Charger Certification Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/certifications-us-eu-guide

- Qi Certification Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/qi-certification-guide
